form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 1.5 lengths at this track over 340m (20.42) beating Motor City Hawk in Grade 5 on February 25. Can continue the winning form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance to win by 1.5 lengths at this track over 340m (20.42) beating Motor City Hawk in Grade 5 on February 25. Can continue the winning form.

form.formComment: Resumes from a three months spell and was a fresh up winner last time in, scoring over 272m at The Gardens. Could pose a serious challenge.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage eighth last time out over 431m at this track. Hard to have this time.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished last in a Grade 5 on April 8 over 340m at this track behind Cluster One beaten 14 lengths (20.44). Placed two back at this track. Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Missed the frame when eighth (21.28) at this track at last run and returns here after a 12 weeks break. Looks to have the job ahead.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early split and led throughout to score when a 2 length winner (19.75) over 340m at this track. Solid chance with even luck.

form.formComment: Has failed to fire at the last couple but he does have good record over this track and distance. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.
